messages.content: صحح Each time someone clicks on your referral link, the link will be automatically tracked and if that visitor signs up successfully for one of the three plans mentioned above, your commission will be calculated instantly and will appear directly on your account page

Each time someone clicks on your referral link, the link will be automatically tracked. If that visitor successfully signs up for one of the three plans mentioned above, your commission will be calculated instantly and will appear directly on your account page.
صحح Once registered, you will be given instant access to a dashboard containing your stats and the unique link generator of your account "Your referral ID".
Once registered, you will be given instant access to a dashboard that contains your stats and the unique link generator of your account, which is your referral ID.

Cookie Duration

Earn a 50% commission on every subscription made under your referral ID for a duration of 30 days.

Additionally, you can provide potential customers with the opportunity to try our services before committing to a subscription. Simply share any link or design from our website under your referral link.

For example:

If a visitor clicks on your referral link but does not immediately subscribe, and then decides to sign up for one of the aforementioned paid plans within 29 days, you will receive a 50% commission. The commission will be instantly available in your account.

صحح 
Freebies

    We offer 1 free “SVG | PNG” design every week.

    Let customers try before they buy a subscription! Get any link from our website or any design to give up away under your referral link.

Freebies

We provide one free "SVG | PNG" design every week.

Additionally, you can allow potential customers to test our services before committing to a subscription. You can share any link or design from our website with your referral link to offer them a trial experience.

صحح 
How can I receive my earnings?

    The Commission that You have earned will be paid by svg4k.com through a PayPal transaction.

    In respect to the payment to be made by svg4k.com for any particular month, You will receive Your Commission, which is accumulated based on a cut-off date on the last day of the month, within the first five days of the following month via a PayPal transaction.

    For the avoidance of doubt, the minimum Commission payout shall be at least USD 10.00 only.

How can I receive my earnings?

The commissions you have earned will be paid by svg4k.com through a PayPal transaction.

Regarding the payment for a specific month, you will receive your accumulated commission, which is calculated up to the last day of the month, within the first five days of the following month via a PayPal transaction.

To clarify, the minimum payout for commissions is set at USD 10.00.
صحح To clarify, the minimum payout for commissions is set at $2
To clarify, the minimum payout for commissions is set at $2.
